title: Data-Science-in-Python-Data-Prep-and-EDA
description: A collection of of projects focused on data preparation and EDA in Python, covering real-world workflows from data gathering, cleaning to feature engineering for machine learning.
summary: 该项目集合了Python数据准备与探索性数据分析的实战项目，涵盖数据收集、清洗及特征工程等机器学习全流程。
